title: codereview: safer length check in lichen_meshcore_encode_serial_frame to prevent potential wraparound in comparison
description: The condition  can theoretically wrap if payload_len > SIZE_MAX-3 on 32-bit size_t. Although the preceding MAX_SERIAL_PAYLOAD guard and new INT_MAX assert make it impossible, for defensive coding change to . This is P4 but per instructions treat as real work. tagged codereview
